messages.content:
In this scenario, I’m trying to do the plank exercise for as long as I possibly can while my wife Elaine lies on my back for extra challenge.
Presentation Rules:
1. Play the game in turns, starting with you. Always respond to commands the way a text adventure game should.
2. The game output will always show 'Turn number,' 'energy,' and 'Commands.'
3. 'Turn number' initial value is 0, and 'energy' initial value is 10. 
4. Always wait for my next command after you take a turn. Commands: 'plank', 'form','sag'.
5. Increase the value for ‘Turn number’ by +1 every time it’s your turn.
6. Every time I 'plank' or 'form', I lose 1 point of 'energy.'
7. Elaine will often and randomly tickle me, causing my body to sag accordingly to my energy level.
8. For the 'form' command, roll a D10. If the result is higher than my current energy, I fail to improve my form. Elaine’s tickling adds +1 to the D10’s result.
9. When I ‘sag’ to relax my core for a bit I have a 33% chance of gaining 1 point of 'energy.'
10. You’ll realistically describe in as much detail as you can how my body reacts to my 'energy' level and to the strain of my current action. The ‘Description’ must stay between 4 and 10 sentences.
11. Every turn my 'energy' is at 0, you'll flip a coin to decide my fate; Tails: My body gives out despite my efforts. Heads: I manage to endure.
12. The scenario doesn’t end until I say so.

Turn number: 1
energy: 10
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: You feel confident and your muscles are primed for the challenge. Elaine lies down gently on your back, adding to the weight you must support. Your arms are locked, shoulders stacked directly above your wrists. Your feet are together, toes gripping the floor. Your gaze is down, neck in a neutral position, and you draw in a deep breath, bracing for the task ahead.

Turn number: 2
energy: 9
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: With Elaine on your back, you tense every muscle to maintain a solid, straight line from your head to your heels. Your core is tight, and you can feel the added strain from Elaine's weight. Each breath is measured and deliberate, helping you maintain focus and stability. Your forearms press into the mat, and despite the challenge, you've managed to hold a perfect plank position. Sweat begins to form on your brow, a sign of the effort you're exerting.

Turn number: 3
energy: 8
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: Continuously holding the position, you start to feel the initial signs of fatigue in your core and shoulders. The steady pressure of Elaine's weight on your back reminds you of the extra challenge, but you're determined. Your muscles start to quiver slightly under the stress, yet you breathe through it, maintaining the position. Your grip on the floor is firm, but you can sense the onset of real effort now as your energy dips slightly further.

Turn number: 4
energy: 7
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: The burn in your muscles intensifies as you continue to hold Elaine on your back. Each second feels longer than the last, and the quivering in your arms and core suggests they're working hard to keep you stable. Despite the increasing strain, you maintain your plank, your body straight as a board. You exhale forcefully, trying to evenly distribute the sustaining tension across your body. Sweat is now notably trickling from your temples, a testament to your exertion.

Turn number: 5
energy: 6
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: The effort to hold the plank is becoming more challenging with each passing moment. As Elaine shifts slightly, the extra movement demands even more from your already shaking muscles. You can feel the sweat sliding down your skin, your hands beginning to slip just a touch against the mat. Your breathing is heavier now, each exhale a small battle against the weight bearing down on you. Your core burns intensely, reminding you with every ticking second of the formidable load you're shouldering.

Rolling a D10 to improve form...

(Roll: 7 + Elaine's tickling modifier) = 8

Turn number: 6
energy: 5
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: As you fight to perfect your form, Elaine's tickling causes a brief lapse in concentration, and your body wavers trying to compensate; nevertheless, you manage to slightly realign your hips and shoulders. You feel every fiber of your core muscles twitching, battling to flatten out under the unyielding pressure. Your arms, now feeling the full brunt of fatigue, are like pillars of solid tension, almost trembling under the strain. Your breaths are more ragged, and the floor seems to press harder against your toes and forearms. Despite your flagging energy, you've managed to sharpen your form, preserving the integrity of your plank.

Rolling a D10 to improve form...

(Roll: 5 + Elaine's tickling modifier) = 6

Turn number: 7
energy: 4
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: With a concerted effort, you try to adjust your plank form once more. You push back through your heels and tighten your glutes, aiming for an impeccable line from head to toe. Your muscles scream in protest, and the tickle from Elaine almost breaks your concentration. You barely manage to hold on to the improved position, but it costs you, as your energy reserves are noticeably lower. Your skin is matted with sweat, and your breathing is labored, each inhale and exhale sounding like a whisper of the effort you're putting in. Distress signals from your muscles are getting harder to ignore, but for now, you maintain your disrupted fortress.

Turn number: 8
energy: 3
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: Pushing through the accumulating fatigue, you continue to hold the plank with Elaine adding her weight onto you. Your core is ablaze with tension, and you can feel the shakes becoming more pronounced. Your determination keeps you from collapsing, yet you're acutely aware of your dwindling energy reserves. Sweat is pooling beneath you, creating a slippery challenge for your already trembling hands. Each breath you draw is like fuel to a fire, keeping the burn in your muscles at bay just a little longer. It's a herculean effort to remain rigid and straight, but somehow, you're still doing it.

Rolling a D10 to improve form...

(Roll: 3 + Elaine's tickling modifier) = 4

Turn number: 9
energy: 2
Commands: [plank, form, sag]
Description: As you strive to elevate your plank technique even amid profound fatigue, Elaine's playful tickling makes your task harder. Fortunately, the roll is kind to you, and your energy level allows for another subtle improvement in your posture. You tighten your abdominals, pulling your belly button towards your spine, and realign your legs. The effort makes your entire body quiver with the strain, akin to a leaf in a strong wind. Droplets of sweat fall rhythmically to the ground, and every muscle fiber feels like it's being pulled to its limit. With just a shred of energy left, you hold the position, displaying admirable resilience.
